blended.narrative: Mont Blanc is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
